Patch Set 3: Code-Review+2

Abandoned

This patch will introduce LU-11395 and LU-11396 failures on Lustre b2_10 branch. Let's abandon it. I'll update the SLES12 SP3 kernel version from 4.4.132-94.33 to 4.4.155-94.50 on b2_10.

commit.subject: LU-11255 kernel: kernel update [SLES12 SP3 4.4.143-94.47]
commit.message:
LU-11255 kernel: kernel update [SLES12 SP3 4.4.143-94.47]

Update SLES12 SP3 kernel to 4.4.143-94.47.

Test-Parameters: mdtfilesystemtype=ldiskfs ostfilesystemtype=ldiskfs \
clientdistro=sles12sp3 ossdistro=sles12sp3 mdsdistro=sles12sp3 \
testgroup=review-ldiskfs

Change-Id: I78807c07d3d957395fa0356cb8d331e47c1190db
Signed-off-by: Jian Yu <yujian@whamcloud.com>
